# API Testing Skill

## Purpose

Establish a repeatable API testing discipline across all REST, GraphQL, and webhook surfaces. Covers contract definition, integration test scaffolding, collection management (Postman/Bruno), mock server setup for local development, and CI integration.

## Step-by-Step Workflow

### 1. Contract Definition

Before writing tests, define the API contract in `docs/specs/api/API_SPEC.yaml` (OpenAPI 3.x):
```yaml
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Project API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
```

### 2. Test Categories

| Category | When | Tooling |
|----------|------|---------|
| Contract tests | Every build | Schemathesis, Dredd |
| Integration tests | Pre-merge | Jest/Vitest, Supertest |
| End-to-end API | Pre-release | Bruno, Postman CLI |
| Load tests | Pre-scale | k6, Locust |
| Security tests | Pre-ship | OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite |

### 3. Bruno Collection Setup (Preferred over Postman)

```bash
# Initialize Bruno collection (open-source, git-friendly)
mkdir -p tests/api/bruno
# Create collection.bru with environment variables
# Create request files per endpoint
```

**Bruno file structure:**
```
tests/api/bruno/
тФЬтФАтФА environments/
тФВ   тФЬтФАтФА local.bru
тФВ   тФЬтФАтФА staging.bru
тФВ   тФФтФАтФА production.bru
тФЬтФАтФА auth/
тФВ   тФЬтФАтФА login.bru
тФВ   тФФтФАтФА refresh.bru
тФФтФАтФА health/
    тФФтФАтФА health-check.bru
```

### 4. Mock Server Setup

For third-party API dependencies, create mocks to enable offline development:

```bash
# Using Prism (OpenAPI mock server)
npx @stoplight/prism-cli mock docs/specs/api/API_SPEC.yaml --port 4010

# Or WireMock for complex scenarios
docker run -p 8080:8080 wiremock/wiremock
```

### 5. CI Integration

Add to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`:
```yaml
- name: API Contract Tests
  run: npx schemathesis run docs/specs/api/API_SPEC.yaml --url http://localhost:3000

- name: Integration Tests
  run: npm run test:api
```

## Validation & Metrics
- 100% of public endpoints covered by contract tests.
- Integration tests run on every PR.
- 0 breaking contract changes merged without version bump.
- API test results in `docs/reports/tests/API_TEST_REPORT.md`.

## Integration Hooks
- Pairs with `git-workflow` skill for CI test gates.
- Referenced by `qa-test-lead` agent.
- `/SCAN security` includes API security test results.

## External Reference
- OpenAPI 3.x spec: https://swagger.io/specification/
- Bruno: https://www.usebruno.com/
- Schemathesis: https://schemathesis.readthedocs.io/
- k6 load testing: https://k6.io/docs/
